markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Kali Supova wins the Supova vs Jialin professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Kursumlijska Banja Quarterfinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Supova vs Jialin professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Kursumlijska Banja Quarterfinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Kali Supova win the Supova vs Jialin: W15 Kursumlijska Banja Quarterfinal match?

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Washington, DC for Jul 10, 2026 10 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KDCA), is above 87.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below

markets.rules_primary: If Jessica Shepard records 15+ points in the Dallas vs Toronto women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Dallas vs Toronto women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 10, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's points recorded.
